test_name: login screen includes credential form controls
angular_behavior: Login page shows heading, email input, password input, and Login submit button.
react_behavior: React app does not render a login screen or credential form controls.

test_name: admin can sign in and reach the authenticated home dashboard
angular_behavior: Admin credentials can be submitted and route changes to /home with dashboard content.
react_behavior: No login fields are available, so sign-in flow cannot be executed and /home dashboard is unreachable through auth flow.

test_name: payment orders page exposes tabular data view
angular_behavior: After login, /payment-orders shows payment orders heading, data table columns, and order rows from API.
react_behavior: Payment Orders route/page is absent in the rendered React UI.

test_name: users page contains user management form and table
angular_behavior: After login, /users shows User Management heading, user form controls, roles selector, and users table.
react_behavior: Users management route/page and controls are absent in the rendered React UI.
